text_one.text:
Feature Banner

The Feature Banner component displays an image/video spanning the full width of the page and gives a content overview with the option to add a Nested Content card.

text_two.text: Default Variation: Page-Width, Image-Left Aligned and White Background

content_trail.headline: We're looking for passionate, success-focused individuals to collaborate with
